_readme: This is a sample ComfyUI API-format workflow for Article2Pod using VibeVoice. Replace this file with your own VibeVoice Single Speaker workflow exported from ComfyUI via Settings > Dev Mode > Save (API Format). Your workflow must contain a LoadAudio node, a LoadTextFromFileNode, and a SaveAudioMP3 node. Article2Pod will locate these automatically by class type regardless of node ID. See https://github.com/Enemyx-net/VibeVoice-ComfyUI for more information about the VibeVoice-ComfyUI nodes and usage.
